whyItMatters: R.I.P. paying full Opus prices for every single AI task. A properly routed open-source Claude stack can replace $200+ a month in frontier model spend. It is not as easy as just swapping the model name and hoping for the same output. But if you start today, you can have GLM 5.2 wired into Claude Code, a local model running on your machine with zero token cos…
